text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Worried about the Japanese Derby,
Matikanefukukitaru pays a visit to a<n>shrine to ask
a favor of the gods.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She happens to see Silence Suzuka,<n>another
entrant in the Japanese<n>Derby, while she's there.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka says she has come to<n>pray that
she isn't overwhelmed by<n>the monster of a race
that is the<n>Japanese Derby.

Matikanefukukitaru realizes that,<n>despite her
amazing talents, Suzuka<n>views her as a rival.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With her concerns put at ease,<n>Matikanefukukitaru
offers up her<n>own prayers alongside Silence
Suzuka.
